data.title: PUMP token hits $5.5B FDV debut, DOGE leads selloff, whale sends $2b BTC to Galaxy Digital, $79m BTC buy, $0.5b ETH purchased, $1b BTC loans on Coinbase, StanChart offers BTC, ETH trading, banks allowed tight crypto holding rules, major crypto developments ongoing.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market experienced a significant selloff, with DOGE leading the majors. Banks now have the option to hold cryptocurrencies under strict regulations imposed by the Federal Reserve. A massive $2 billion worth of Bitcoin was transferred to Galaxy Digital by a single whale for selling purposes. Sequans made a notable purchase of Bitcoin worth $79 million. The total value of BTC-backed loans surpassed $1 billion collateral on the trading platform Coinbase. Standard Chartered became the first global bank to offer Bitcoin and Ethereum trading services. Bitmine Immersion acquired $500 million worth of Ethereum. Sharplink, the leading holder, purchased an additional $73 million worth of ETH. Bank of America introduced a weekly research publication on cryptocurrencies and expressed optimism towards Ethereum. Ripple, Circle, and BitGo are in the process of obtaining a US bank trust license. xStocks can now serve as collateral on Kamino. Grayscale has filed for an IPO. Revolut Pay via Moonpay is now available across the UK and EEA. The trial for Tornado Cash is set to commence today, and Kazakhstan has outlined plans regarding crypto reserve management.

data.title: Crypto drops, stocks soar to new highs. Sharplink emerges as top ETH holder with $73m purchase. Banks permitted to hold crypto under regulations. Whale transfers $2b BTC for selling. Sequans acquires $79m BTC. BTC loans on Coinbase surpass $1b. StanChart pioneers BTC, ETH trading. Bitmine Immersion acquires $500m ETH. Wall Street giants bullish on ETH. Major players apply for US bank trust license. Grayscale files for IPO. Revolut Pay expands across UK, EEA. Tornado Cash trial begins in Kazakhstan on crypto reserve strategy.
data.description: The recent crypto selloff was spearheaded by DOGE, with banks now permitted to hold crypto assets under stringent regulations from the Federal Reserve. A significant whale transferred $2 billion worth of BTC to Galaxy Digital for selling purposes, while Sequans acquired $79 million worth of BTC. The total value of BTC-backed loans has surpassed $1 billion in collateral on Coinbase. Standard Chartered has become the first worldwide bank to provide trading services for BTC and ETH. Bitmine Immersion made a substantial purchase of $500 million worth of ETH, with Sharplink following suit by becoming the top holder after acquiring an additional $73 million in ETH. Bank of America has introduced a weekly crypto research report and expressed optimism towards ETH. Ripple, Circle, and BitGo are in the process of acquiring a US bank trust license. xStocks are now acceptable as collateral on Kamino. Grayscale has filed for an IPO, and Revolut Pay through Moonpay is now accessible throughout the UK and EEA. The trial period for Tornado Cash is commencing today, and Kazakhstan has unveiled its plans concerning crypto reserves.

data.title: BTC hits $123K, $5.5B pump launch. SUI soars, leading L1s as TVL hits ATH. ETH proposals on ZK integration. Crypto market cap up $1.2T+ since April lows. Blackrock IBIT hits $80b AUM. $600m sellout for PUMP.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged to new all-time highs, with a dominance of 65%. On July 10, the highest short liquidation in 4 years was recorded. SUI is leading Layer 1 protocols as the Total Value Locked (TVL) reaches an all-time high. Sharplink has acquired $49 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) and has now become the largest ETH holder. ETH has proposed to deepen integration with ZK technology. The cryptocurrency market has added over $1.2 trillion in market capitalization since hitting lows in April. Blackrock's IBIT has become the fastest ever to reach $80 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM). A $600 million sellout was recorded for PUMP.

data.title: BTC & ETH surge, S&P at ATH. $76b IBIT AUM record. China reevaluates crypto stance. $1b raised by K Wave Media. $17.7b BTC bought by firms in Q2. ETH Foundation sells $3.5m._OKX USDT ‘Simple Earn’ rate jumps to 53%. Germany’s NRW releases blockchain bond. PlasmaFDN X account hacked.
data.description: Bitcoin hits an all-time high (ATH) and Ethereum surpasses $3,000 due to significant ETF inflows. The market observes one of the largest Bitcoin short liquidation events in many years. There are indications that China may be reconsidering its stance on cryptocurrencies. The investment firm IBIT reaches a record $76 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM). Former President Trump comments on how tariffs can impact cryptocurrencies, leading to a stock market rally. The US Treasury eliminates reporting rules for crypto brokers. K Wave Media collects $1 billion to invest in Bitcoin. Companies acquire a total of $17.7 billion in Bitcoin during the second quarter. BIT Mining plans to raise $300 million to purchase SOL. The Ethereum Foundation sells $3.5 million worth of ETH. Sharplink experiences a 35% increase in 5 days due to its Ethereum treasury involvement. GameSquare acquires $5 million in Ethereum. Coinbase and Perplexity collaborate on real-time data initiatives. Robinhood introduces Ethereum and SOL staking services in the US. The interest rate on OKX's USDT 'Simple Earn' feature rises to 53%. Germany's NRW state issues a blockchain bond. There is a reported hack on an account linked to PlasmaFDN X.

data.title: BTC reaches all-time high, PUMPFUN unveils tokenomics, PENGU surges. ETH aims for $10k, BTC surpasses Alphabet. Whale loses $26m on ETH short, Emirates partners with Cryptocom. Strategy sees $24b BTC profit. BTCS to acquire $225m ETH, stock doubles. Gamesquare up 100%. Sharplink trails ETH foundation in holdings. XRP to hold $500m RLUSD with BNY Mellon. Circle in revenue sharing with Bybit. Kraken, Backed to expand xStocks on BNB. Bitget launches 6 tokenised stock products. Ant Group to integrate USDC.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has reached a new all-time high, with Ethereum (ETH) leading the major cryptocurrencies. CEO Hayes predicts ETH could surge to $10,000. BTC now surpasses Alphabet in market value. A whale lost a $26 million profit from a poorly timed ETH short. Emirates has partnered with Cryptocom for crypto integration. A strategy currently holds an unrealized profit of $24 billion in BTC. BTCS plans to acquire $225 million worth of ETH, causing their stock price to double. Gamesquare's stock also doubled within a day. Sharplink is second only to the ETH foundation in ETH holdings. XRP is set to custody $500 million worth of RLUSD with BNY Mellon. Circle has entered a revenue share agreement with Bybit. Kraken and Backed are expanding xStocks to the BNB chain. Bitget has launched six tokenized stock products. Ant Group will integrate USDC into its platform.

data.title: Crypto surges, ETH leads with $20m buy, $HYPE perps 60% higher. US House pushes for crypto, GMX faces $40m exploit, Tether holds $8b gold. OmegaPro founders accused of $650m fraud. EIGEN reduces staff by 25%.
data.description: ETH is leading the surge among major cryptocurrencies while BTC's dominance is declining. The US House is making moves to establish the US as a key player in the crypto space. Sharplink is set to acquire $20 million worth of ETH, causing their stock to soar by 12%. GameSquare has raised $8 million for ETH acquisitions, resulting in a 60% increase in their stock price. Bit Digital's stock continues to rise due to its focus on ETH. BioSig and StreamEx are planning to tokenize commodities on SOL. Phantom has introduced perpetual contracts with the help of Hyperliquid. GMX is dealing with a $40 million exploit. Tether has disclosed an $8 billion worth of gold reserves stored in a Swiss vault and projects to become the largest BTC miner this year. OpenAI's stock tokens are supported by SPV through Robinhood. Aevo is offering 1000x leverage on tokenized stocks. The founders of OmegaPro are facing charges for a $650 million fraud by the DoJ. The Economist has labeled Tether as a money launderer's paradise. EIGEN has announced a 25% decrease in staff numbers.

data.title: ETH skyrockets, Phantom debuts perps, Trump delays tariffs. US House moves to be crypto leader. Sharplink buys $20m ETH, stock up 12%. GameSquare ups $8m for ETH, stock +60%. Bit Digital surges on ETH move. BioSig, StreamEx to tokenize on SOL. GMX faces $40m exploit. Tether discloses $8b gold stash. Tether to be top BTC miner. OpenAI issues SPV-backed tokens. Aevo offers 1000x lev on stock tokens. OmegaPro founders charged in $650m fraud. Tether labeled perfect for money laundering. EIGEN cuts staff by 25%.
data.description: ETH is leading the way for major cryptocurrencies, with BTC dominance declining. The US House is making moves to establish the US as a hub for crypto activities. Sharplink is set to acquire $20 million worth of ETH, causing their stock to rise by 12%. GameSquare has raised $8 million to invest in ETH, resulting in a 60% increase in their stock value. Bit Digital's stock continues to surge due to its pivot towards ETH. BioSig and StreamEx are planning to tokenize commodities on SOL blockchain. Phantom has introduced perpetual contracts powered by Hyperliquid. GMX is dealing with a $40 million exploit. Tether has disclosed an $8 billion gold reserve in a Swiss vault and aims to become the largest BTC miner this year. Robinhood is backing OpenAI stock tokens with an SPV. Aevo is offering 1000x leverage on tokenized stocks. The founders of OmegaPro are facing charges of a $650 million fraud by the US Department of Justice. Tether is described as a favorable option for money laundering by The Economist. EIGEN has announced a 25% reduction in staff.

data.title: US Govt invests $218k ETH; PumpFun plans $600m token sale. Crypto rebounds post-tariff; ETH, altcoins fluctuate. Strategic $4.2b raise for BTC.
data.description: Cryptocurrency prices experienced a dip following the news of tariff letters, but recovered shortly after. Ethereum (ETH) outperformed other cryptocurrencies, while altcoins remained weak due to the announcement of a significant move by PumpFun. PumpFun disclosed plans for a $600 million token sale, setting its valuation at $4 billion. On July 22, the Trump administration is set to release a crypto report. The US government made a deposit of $218,000 worth of ETH into Coinbase. Robinhood is in talks with US regulators regarding tokenized shares. Truth Social has submitted applications for a Blue Chip crypto ETF. The US decided to drop its appeal in the Tornado Cash lawsuit. A strategy is being developed to raise $4.2 billion in equity to purchase Bitcoin (BTC). Semler Scientific invested $20 million in BTC. Bit Digital shifted focus to an ETH treasury, resulting in a stock price increase. The total value of tokenized assets on the Ethereum blockchain has reached $5 billion. Metaplanet intends to utilize BTC as collateral for merger and acquisition activities. The CEO of XRP is scheduled to testify before the senate on crypto-related legislation. The SEC has requested firms to make amendments to their SOL ETF applications. Cryptocurrency stocks in Hong Kong saw a surge in value due to stablecoin developments. BBVA has introduced BTC and ETH trading services for Spanish retail investors. Last week, El Salvador purchased $800,000 worth of BTC.

data.title: Crypto sees fluctuations: ETH shines, altcoins struggle post-PumpFun news. $600m token sale planned. US gov invests $218k ETH. Trump to release crypto report July 22. US buys $20m BTC. Tokenized assets hit $5b on ETH. El Salvador $800k BTC buy last week.
data.description: Cryptocurrency experienced a brief drop in value following news about tariff letters, but quickly bounced back. Ethereum (ETH) showed strong performance while altcoins were weak after PumpFun announced plans for a $600 million token sale, putting their valuation at $4 billion. The Trump administration is set to release a crypto report on July 22, and the US government made a deposit of $218,000 worth of ETH into Coinbase. Meanwhile, Robinhood is in discussions with US authorities regarding tokenized shares. Truth Social has applied for a Blue Chip crypto ETF. In other news, the US decided to withdraw its appeal in the Tornado Cash lawsuit. A strategy to raise $4.2 billion in equity to purchase Bitcoin is in the works, with Semler Scientific buying $20 million in BTC. Bit Digital shifted its focus to an ETH treasury, resulting in a stock surge. Tokenized assets on the Ethereum network have reached $5 billion, and Metaplanet plans to use BTC as collateral for mergers and acquisitions. The CEO of XRP will testify before the Senate on legislative matters, and the SEC has requested firms to revise SOL ETF applications. Hong Kong crypto stocks have seen significant growth due to stablecoin momentum, while BBVA has opened Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for Spanish retail customers. Lastly, El Salvador recently purchased $800,000 worth of BTC.

data.title: BTC hits record weekly close. DOGE leads, BTC dominance drops to 65%. Whale moves $4.35b out of $8.7b BTC. Public firms buy 131k BTC in Q2. Metaplanet adds $241m BTC. BlackRock holds $4.4b ETH, while Fickel shifts $204m to Coinbase. ETH futures shorting nears ATH. UAE denies golden visa for TON stakers. GCR trader faces scrutiny. Elon's America party backs BTC. Vitalik proposes gas cap. Robinhood offers 213 tokenized stocks. Minna Bank tests stablecoin, Rostec to launch in Russia.
data.description: Bitcoin has achieved its highest weekly close ever. Dogecoin is leading the top 10 cryptocurrencies, while Bitcoin's dominance in the market has fallen to 65%. A whale recently transferred $4.35 billion worth of Bitcoin out of their $8.7 billion holding. Various public firms purchased a total of 131,000 Bitcoins in the second quarter. Metaplanet has acquired an additional $241 million worth of Bitcoin. BlackRock now has $4.4 billion in Ethereum holdings. Fickel moved $204 million worth of Ethereum to Coinbase. Short positions on Ethereum futures are close to reaching an all-time high. The UAE has denied rumors about offering golden visas to TON stakers. The trading history of GCR is being called into question. Elon Musk's America party is planning to adopt Bitcoin. Vitalik Buterin has proposed a gas cap of 16.77 million. Robinhood has introduced 213 tokenized stocks. Japan's Minna Bank has launched a stablecoin pilot. Russia's Rostec is set to issue a stablecoin.

data.title: Squamish municipal workers vote 100% for strike due to lack of progress in bargaining, concerns over cost of living.
data.description: In Squamish, British Columbia, CUPE 2269 President Celeste Bickford expressed concern over the lack of progress in bargaining with the District of Squamish. A 100 percent strike vote was taken by members due to the district's failure to address important issues affecting frontline workers. Bickford highlighted rising living costs in the region, leading residents to leave as they can no longer afford to stay. This vote reflects the deep worries among members, emphasizing the need for urgent action.

data.title: BNB soars to record $788 fueled by institutional adoption, $1B token burn program, trading at $783.58 amidst bullish trend.
data.description: This week, Binance Coin (BNB) reached an all-time high of $788 before settling at $783.58. The remarkable surge was backed by robust bullish momentum attributed to growing institutional interest and a $1 billion token burn initiative.

data.title: Monero (XMR) introduces GUI 0.18.4.1 'Fluorine Fermi' with bug fixes, enhancing user experience.
data.description: Monero (XMR) has released its most recent GUI software version, 0.18.4.1, named 'Fluorine Fermi', with emphasis on resolving bugs and implementing minor enhancements.

data.title: ETH's price breaks $3,700 reaching $3,724.84 (+1.26% in 24h), as RSI enters overbought territory. Bullish momentum continues.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $3,724.84, reflecting a 1.26% increase in the last 24 hours. Technical analysis suggests that there is a strong bullish momentum in Ethereum's market, although the overbought Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a need for caution moving forward.

data.title: Paul Mueller Company corrects Q2 2025 earnings report with errors in EPS for the three and six months ended June 30.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Springfield, Missouri, Paul Mueller Company (OTC: MUEL) issued a correction regarding an earlier report that included inaccurate earnings per share figures for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025.

data.title: BTC price falls to $117,465 (-0.46% in 24h) amid market volatility, testing critical support levels.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is currently at $117,465, experiencing a decrease of 0.46% over the past 24 hours. This drop in BTC value comes after a significant decline on Thursday, causing bearish pressure in the market. Investors are closely monitoring key technical levels as the cryptocurrency faces uncertainty in its price trajectory.

data.title: Data breach at Tea Dating Advice, Inc. being investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, affecting customers' data. Jul 25, 2025 incident.
data.description: In Newtown, PA, on July 25, 2025, the legal firm of Edelson Lechtzin LLP is looking into privacy complaints related to a data breach at Tea Dating Advice, Inc. (referred to as "Tea"). The breach was discovered around the same date. Those affected are encouraged to contact for further information and assistance.

data.title: Zip celebrates fifth anniversary with new offices in San Francisco and New York after surpassing billions in processed requests.
data.description: Zip, a procurement company, is celebrating its fifth anniversary by opening new offices in San Francisco and New York due to significant growth. The company has exceeded billions in processed requests since its inception.

data.title: CASEKOO introduces Magic Stand for summer pool parties to ensure phone safety; essential for a splash zone.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Los Angeles, a report highlighted the significance of phone safety during summer pool parties. These gatherings are known for their lively atmosphere, with music playing, drinks cooling, and floats bobbing in the water under the warm sun. However, the focus on fun often neglects the importance of safeguarding phones. It is crucial to be cautious with electronic devices in these settings to prevent damage. The article points out the need to strike a balance between enjoyment and protecting belongings.

data.title: Diginex announces Rhino Ventures exercized 2.25M warrants at $5.13/share, totaling $11.5M, canceling EGM.
data.description: On July 22, 2025, Diginex Limited, a top player in Sustainability RegTech solutions traded on NASDAQ under ticker symbol DGNX, revealed that Rhino Ventures Limited had chosen to exercise warrants at $5.13 per share to obtain 2,250,000 ordinary shares of the company. Rhino Ventures Limited paid the total exercise price of $11,542,500 in full to Diginex. These warrants, which were set to expire on July 23, 2025, were successfully exercised by Rhino Ventures Limited, indicating a significant investment in Diginex's future.
